_note: docs/46 Phase 3 (2026-07-12): ledger import-boundary ratchet. Files outside modules/ledger that reference the journalEntries/journalLines Drizzle tables are grandfathered here; the set may only SHRINK. New GL reads go through LedgerReadService (accountNet/cashPosition/entryRefNo) — or add an equally narrow method there — and postings via LedgerService.postEntry. Some grandfathered reads are by design and expected to stay (finance reconcileControls REC-04 reads both sides of the reconciliation independently; consolidation's group eliminations); the rest are Phase 3+ migration candidates. Drop a file here in the same PR that removes its direct reads (--update regenerates). Round 6b (2026-07-17): six tie-out consumers migrated to the narrow LedgerReadService (accountGross gross-debit/credit read + entryRefNo status option added) — assets (FA-09 draft-disposal lookup), leases + lessor-leases (2600/1610 GL-vs-schedule recon), payroll (PAY-02 liability schedule), inventory-ledger (sub-ledger vs GL control tie), commitments (budget actuals). 21 -> 15. Round 7 (2026-07-17): four more consumers migrated — ic-recon (Due-From/Due-To snapshot -> accountNet), rev-disclosure (TFRS-15 rollforward -> new accountActivity line read), budget (budget-vs-actual actuals -> new accountGrossByAccount grouped read; account name/type meta joined separately), finance.listWriteOffs (AR-WRITEOFF register -> new sourceRegister read). 15 -> 11. Round 8 (2026-07-17): three more — intercompany (per-tenant 1150/2150 elimination picture -> new accountNetByTenant), finance-metrics (segment profitability -> new netByDimension, accounts-type filter stays ledger-side), controls (GL-05 weekend manual-JE scan -> new weekendManualEntries audit read). 11 -> 8. Round 9 (2026-07-17): three more — planning (driver actuals + forecast-vs-actual -> new accountNetPerAccountPeriod / accountNetPerAccount), profitability (allocation source + direct P&L 4%/5% -> accountNetPerAccount with accountPrefixes), consolidation (entity batch nets -> new accountNetPerTenantAccount; segment report -> netByDimension extended with department dim + period bound). 8 -> 5 (bank, tax-reports, reconciliation, bi, seed-demo-finance). Round 10 (2026-07-17): bi (finance-trend revenue/expense per period incl. the ledger_code sub-ledger filter -> new revenueExpenseByPeriod) and reconciliation (period/opening nets -> accountNetPerAccount + new periodBefore option; GL workbench import -> new accountLineRefs line-ref read). 5 -> 3 (bank, tax-reports, seed-demo-finance).
